questions.statement: The officer told me in no uncertain terms that she cannot put up with such nonsense. &quot;Put up with&quot; means :

<p><span style="font-weight: 700;">Directions:&nbsp;</span><strong>Choose the most suitable antonym of the underlined word:</strong></p>
The mountaineering team could not climb further as they were <u>engulfed</u> by a treacherous fog.

<p><strong>Select the most appropriate synonym of the given word.</strong></p>

<p>EXULTATION</p>

<p>Direction: Select the option that is opposite in meaning to the given bold word and mark your response accordingly.</p>

<p>A stream of <u><strong>invective</strong> </u>from some sectors of the press continues to assail the government.</p>

<span id="docs-internal-guid-17e1f8d0-7fff-38cd-f35b-68276dffb8d1"><span style="  background-color: transparent; font-variant-numeric: normal; font-variant-east-asian: normal; font-variant-alternates: normal; font-variant-position: normal; vertical-align: baseline; white-space-collapse: preserve;">What is the term for being attracted to or caused by animals?</span></span>
options: <span id="docs-internal-guid-00d3b4c5-7fff-4786-14c3-cfea8cad5ded"><span style="  background-color: transparent; font-variant-numeric: normal; font-variant-east-asian: normal; font-variant-alternates: normal; font-variant-position: normal; vertical-align: baseline; white-space-collapse: preserve;">Zoophilous</span></span> /

<span id="docs-internal-guid-7d9e5437-7fff-512d-e943-ee4b11fc68a8"><span style="  background-color: transparent; font-variant-numeric: normal; font-variant-east-asian: normal; font-variant-alternates: normal; font-variant-position: normal; vertical-align: baseline; white-space-collapse: preserve;">Yawning</span></span> /

<span id="docs-internal-guid-fdd809ea-7fff-5a5d-093b-0cdb9a2982a0"><span style="  background-color: transparent; font-variant-numeric: normal; font-variant-east-asian: normal; font-variant-alternates: normal; font-variant-position: normal; vertical-align: baseline; white-space-collapse: preserve;">Zirconium</span></span> /

<span id="docs-internal-guid-7d270927-7fff-6275-fcc3-6db824ce69bf"><span style="  background-color: transparent; font-variant-numeric: normal; font-variant-east-asian: normal; font-variant-alternates: normal; font-variant-position: normal; vertical-align: baseline; white-space-collapse: preserve;">Yttrium</span></span> /

questions.statement:
<p><strong>Give one word for each of the following expressions choosing from those given below.</strong></p>

<p>The order to stay in one&#39;s own bailiwick means that a person should remain in his own.</p>

<p><strong><span id="docs-internal-guid-806733d4-7fff-39d8-6bc6-343ddc9ba8e0"><span style="  font-weight: 700; font-variant-numeric: normal; font-variant-east-asian: normal; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;">Select the most appropriate word for the given group of words.</span></span></strong></p>

<p>A short piece of writing that praises and promotes something.</p>

<p>Select the option that can be used as a one-word substitute for the given group of words.</p>

<p>Well-known for bad qualities or deeds&nbsp;</p>

<p><strong>Choose the CORRECT synonym for the highlighted word:</strong></p>

<p>Nowadays, some actors are refusing to <u><strong>endorse</strong></u> fairness products.</p>

<p style=""><strong>Choose the most suitable option that describes the meaning of the following underlined idiom and phrase.</strong></p>

<p style="">The exam <u>went down in flames</u>, I should have studied well.</p>
